name: @giraffetechnology/openclaw-aivan
description: OpenClaw plugin bridge for AIVAN, a local-first AI trade salesperson assistant by Giraffe Technology

extensions.title: AIVAN: Check Health
extensions.description: Check whether the local AIVAN service is running

extensions.title: AIVAN: Forward Trade Event
extensions.description: Forward a normalized OpenClaw trade event to the local AIVAN service

extensions.title: AIVAN: Open Dashboard
extensions.description: Open the AIVAN trade salesperson dashboard in a browser

extensions.title: AIVAN: Get Pending Drafts
extensions.description: Retrieve message drafts awaiting human approval in AIVAN

extensions.title: AIVAN: Approve Draft
extensions.description: Approve a pending AIVAN draft for dispatch (human approval required)
